---
title: "JSON Schema Reference — Index"
subtitle: "All UIAO machine-readable schemas"
date: 2026-05-14
---

::: {.callout-note}
The UIAO JSON schemas define the machine-readable contracts for
canon artifacts (orgpath registries, KSI evidence bundles, adapter
manifests, etc.). Every schema is published as a developer-reference
page per [ADR-068](../../adr/adr-068-canon-publication-policy.qmd).

The schemas are versioned alongside the canon they constrain. To
contribute a new schema, see the canon-change process declared in
[`AGENTS.md`](https://github.com/WhalerMike/uiao/blob/main/AGENTS.md).
:::

## All Schemas

| Schema | File |
|---|---|
| [UIAO Adapter Registry Schema](adapter-registry.schema.qmd) | `adapter-registry.schema.json` |
| [UIAO Delegation Matrix (AUs + Scoped Roles)](admin-units.schema.qmd) | `admin-units.schema.json` |
| [UIAO Application Identity Schema (UIAO_129)](application-identity.schema.qmd) | `application-identity.schema.json` |
| [UIAO OrgPath Codebook](codebook.schema.qmd) | `codebook.schema.json` |
| [SCIM 2.0 Common Attributes (RFC 7643 §3.1)](common.schema.qmd) | `common.schema.json` |
| [UIAO Device OrgPath Plane Registry](device-planes.schema.qmd) | `device-planes.schema.json` |
| [UIAO OrgTree Drift Engine Configuration](drift-engine-config.schema.qmd) | `drift-engine-config.schema.json` |
| [UIAO Dynamic Group Library](dynamic-groups.schema.qmd) | `dynamic-groups.schema.json` |
| [SCIM 2.0 Enterprise User Extension (RFC 7643 §4.3)](enterprise-user.schema.qmd) | `enterprise-user.schema.json` |
| [UIAO KSI Evidence Bundle](evidence-bundle.schema.qmd) | `evidence-bundle.schema.json` |
| [SCIM 2.0 Group Resource (RFC 7643 §4.2)](group.schema.qmd) | `group.schema.json` |
| [UIAO Image Registry Schema](image-registry.schema.qmd) | `image-registry.schema.json` |
| [UIAO Unified Key Security Indicator (KSI) Schema](ksi.schema.qmd) | `ksi.schema.json` |
| [UIAO OrgTree Readiness Bundle Schema](orgtree-readiness.schema.qmd) | `orgtree-readiness.schema.json` |
| [UIAO OrgTree Policy Targeting Canon](policy-targets.schema.qmd) | `policy-targets.schema.json` |
| [UIAO Reciprocity-Record Schema](reciprocity-record.schema.qmd) | `reciprocity-record.schema.json` |
| [UIAO Reciprocal-Consumption Entitlement Registry Schema](registry.schema.qmd) | `registry.schema.json` |
| [UIAO Substrate Manifest Schema](substrate-manifest.schema.qmd) | `substrate-manifest.schema.json` |
| [UIAO Tier-2 Contract Fixture Schema](tier2-fixture.schema.qmd) | `tier2-fixture.schema.json` |
| [UDC Export Schema](udc_export.schema.qmd) | `udc_export.schema.json` |
| [UDC Metadata Schema](udc_metadata.schema.qmd) | `udc_metadata.schema.json` |
| [UDC Pipeline Schema](udc_pipeline.schema.qmd) | `udc_pipeline.schema.json` |
| [UDC Templates Schema](udc_templates.schema.qmd) | `udc_templates.schema.json` |
| [SCIM 2.0 User Resource (RFC 7643 §4.1)](user.schema.qmd) | `user.schema.json` |
| [UIAO Workspace Contract Schema](workspace-contract.schema.qmd) | `workspace-contract.schema.json` |
